entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0002 (PS941) awarded to QWEST CORPORATION (8481), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ACCEPT AND INCORPORATE PROPOSAL QU1157.01E INTO THE CONTRACT IN ITS ENTIRETY. A. PROPOSAL TITLE: PROPOSED NETWORX UNIVERSAL CONTRACT MODIFICATION TO ADD MANAGED NETWORK SERVICES (MNS) ICB CASE NUMBER PRICING FOR DDOS PROACTIVE SERVICES ALL AGENCIES AT ALL CONUS LOCATIONS. PROPOSAL DATE: JULY 21, 2016
2. THE ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT REMAINS UNCHANGED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
